name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: A quick check-in with less than six months to go…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Do you think Democrats in Congress are doing enough to oppose Donald Trump + the MAGA agenda right now?
#

**We want to hear from you directly about this, Peter.** With the 2026 midterms just six months away, we're doing a quick check-in with our most engaged supporters to see how people are feeling about Democrats in this critical moment. **Will you take 30 seconds today to share your thoughts?**
---

**Do you think Democrats in Congress are doing enough to oppose Donald Trump and the MAGA agenda right now?** ✅ **Yes** – I can see Democrats are fighting hard
⚠️ **Kind of** – I think they could be doing more
❌ **No** – I think Democrats need to step it up even more
❓ **I’m not sure** **[CONFIRM YOUR CHOICE: CLICK HERE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104325?t=1&akid=10437%2E614464%2ENuzZqy)**
---

---

---
Peter,
Team Collins here.
There is a massive push in Washington right now to add a 51st state and permanently alter the American flag.

clean_body: | Peter, Team Collins here. There is a massive push in Washington right now to add a 51st state and permanently alter the American flag. The Senate is completely divided, and the stakes for our democratic process could not be higher. If Radical Democrats get their way, it would fundamentally change the balance of power and silence our Common-Sense voices. We need to know exactly where you stand before any permanent decisions are made. You are our firewall against these radical changes. | Right now, our opponents and outside special interest groups are pouring money into Maine, flooding the digital airwaves with attacks designed to distort Susan's record of independent leadership. They think they can use out-of-state money to buy up every ad slot to drown out common sense. We cannot let them have the last word. The Radical Left has an endless supply of dark money that they are using to drown out the truth. We need your help, now more than ever, to keep our ads on the digital airwaves. Don't let the screens go dark. Help us keep the truth on the airwaves! the only Republican Senator in a state Kamala Harris won, Senator Susan Collins is the Democrats' . This isn't just about politics; it's about protecting Mainers and building a firewall that Chuck Schumer's millions cannot breach. | Paid for by Collins for Senator P.O. Box 1096 Bangor, ME 04402 |

Derek, In just a second, we’re going to ask you to [**chip in $7 to the DNC.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260509_7054_fr&amount=7&refcode2=7054_22930333_sJ6vJn&akid=7054%2E22930333%2EsJ6vJn) We know what you might be thinking: _Why should I donate today?_ **The truth is that the resources we raise _right now_ — while primaries are still underway and races are heating up — will determine the number of voters we’ll be able to reach before Election Day.** And here’s the thing, Derek: Trump and his Republican allies are already scaling up their efforts to reach those same voters. Trump and his MAGA allies have a total of _$843.6 million_ on hand. That’s money they’ll spend on attack ads, registering more Republican voters, and persuading those who may still be undecided. _If we don’t have the resources to go toe-to-toe with them, we won’t win back Congress._ [**That’s why we’re asking: Can we count on you to chip in $7 to the DNC now? name: Michele Tafoya
subject: Taking a sledgehammer to this broken system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there’s no incumbency advantage.
| [](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/zeNaoabnyAyuviNvGAfU381jyh7bS_yFsGZGzs3lrEBXjVhZC38qYxNjOn60FOnWRWzdRAh3Oz5xd4f2atnup4mp4BzZHGGXd8COHRXLo6jsjMaOmujZaQPku_zBn34mrEUYgQkv_rFMno1fZZXHrZnum5-EKst6SxlO0ye_B8A-Y_FFhNhWI9REWEnFf-ioCYb7lcNqkeIGM5QpF_kqL_e4lmqUj_ObbQU6b5IN8NFra8A3x5mJoZc-RplV5VpM6ru39iWgTey92s-5OV56U2-rpA4okpIKsGVXrdkop1RgeKXhCwpiYfcPUOSBTAvkzaqwscnaAy10encks1-UM_AZh8_232OrVZaPkqSFMwi5Gqf52WJGKH1PZLXn8eB_k05E05YMgQsjfxIQQFhTYwTtdm7PViflXJRfRMChm4SWWHDACjeVIYyEhkrs5uTA-3nGw0QI039aTc_ykY71yXvhNmbImx6q6hOR1SVmK-s0BI-4pNz03Msdy7zvPWR1x-Hf_bIe4j-CZDaKtepZ4GeghRscyDta8VNMMwM1_Dag7AhobTmdtJXiIwIsX4j1pDtjJhQ04UFmumk-gAZwjfhYwotulP_B4VXBuRTP4t1LnBg6blB0ChEJp0i4jyii3Bzj8dnusdqoIt1AoIfvCSKothi5LstMYMpD7misBgOWhkJ9izKlaBXIda4vAwjBUZ3Y8ldSCyQNTHi8ygkm_iImmhftlBiyUWe5amKiVVNZDhzdLjuD-4RxtA5ki2yAxw8cCDRBtop8D5opI0w4WQcQ0qv5NLenK3-fwNp4ZStCDaWv94-OZ0iFVm-SNBUUFzBl/MHkxvG3Kw049ebTHilN1e7k62Kya00YA/20)
---
Hi Peter - this is Michele Tafoya.
I had a great life reporting from the sidelines of some of the most memorable football games in sports history. I don't come from the world of politics. Some folks on the far-Left say that makes me unqualified to run for politics.
I say being an outsider is an asset.
Why? Because the career politicians are the ones running this country into the ground. They oversaw unprecedented fraud, they sold us out to enrich themselves, and they pitted Americans against each other for cheap political gain - the kind of thing that drives normal people like you and me nuts.
[My candidacy for U.S. Senate will take a sledgehammer to this broken system.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/WGDI_8h-kEaUa0RUUp8rx4EpaY1shmxjX1pId8Sge6TTc1QgJadbgqVXtppgLsCchJiKXU6SlGDIPUjjnRVmk09ZAApptb427dyYd8vmySlryYh51lzA5WKoSC_3cC6bvZJnN1-WuHcgXixYSszwyGdOPuQpxqSZqka9fmOBN_EOhF3fopnyHSEFAAIaVYWoac5WjU9JzwhN-mu9FiKP4LFjMOiw6bdP53RIB5zEqY47e9rA__VNUQJ4SPADqSm8Xi-ewEwoBg7kRpEjUjoIkJu8EDACDHoYQp9a7QC9SF1dgOihtH4-ZhlORvAh6bmh21FWSSlf3ZHEa2ffgBBZD74XIAfnkBluc_1vmfhsFmk3YYWzkCcgZOBxzHFS6S--EWGAeAlynyAzOH88RIZOVnqzTZVpzdeDNDb_SlMrHIlEVQpfOzS6VX6XY0qottHzVLrkLO0IbEYnvlVT4qtWNh4kMMgXbDTDetfZO09UhJ0nIrHVXcXg3GoGHNdxEdsxwYVk3sH8_OP_-DRTYn2cw5udePTSPYEpHVSaXaDiPHdDq6zlYNHa6DKxtL5u8V37juQCQS5cuqLehFWd5clxJNjZvcf9c7Iu8xXusA2x-1LfzplpbJJQTKHa-5HaNhOjBTbmQeWn4rBNSUK72bZbvk_xPA7qzHRNzvrCmN7dOjV6DbiNayujGwB4vl91TfD2fceokhZG8Ci0uABzcQ74937piCWe5Jgnov_oBPkAaTKbEOhEvgHeb16KQsr3mWWyZ5Uhgp92YsgPsk3dA7GNY3MvqqP7X6o7o00igEAkm0HpYGL4zwqdYyWeYnzuNoGlJF0q/_PTQvbyFdBaiAg7L3fjhaUUKsK9RPfVb/20)
Unfortunately, the system is fighting back. My opponents are quintessential political elites with a vast network of mega-donors and deep connections with special interests. Like I said, they've been at this for a long time...
But I have three (big!) things working in my favor:
1\. This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there's no incumbency advantage.**
**2\. My opponents are racing each other to the far-Left. One of my opponents stunned voters by saying she regretted voting for the Laken Riley Act. The other is the sitting Lt. Governor, who was in power during the rampant fraud allegations. These extreme records don't appeal to most Minnesotans.
3\. No one in this race will outwork me. I made it to the very top of my industry by being willing to do what it takes to win. We're holding events in every corner of the state, our ads are hard-hitting, and I've got the grit and determination to win. If we can raise the funds, this race is over.
That last point is important.
[Unlike my opponents, I’m an outsider. I’m building this campaign from scratch. That means I’m wholly and completely reliant on grassroots donors to power us. I’m hoping you could help us out there.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/0CrHJuQwGrZ9BRdQw2Hv3kPSVpuy5L8SJfG1Y0rEq1ZJ3PPscb7ypUWqEU6fE_masuM3T56mvF6eSzTxA81vtwfH1ghT62O4zaPcVdRi5SJJ9nsX2OzrXIpIGjU237aBlN1nvmHuEMKqy_CQMMrb7e3EKnoYL8YzDUvjGUtKwKHKFf7ojXciS-1t39IPTMPSh5DDIA0jCKADSiLXMyVDZa8bvralVcG7GJpTocIWwfw6Oi7w1o2DjmmdPleg7cfTzeHaB5o8RdDqBvdZC4OCWzGj3SYOTfSgPsGxO4Z1CUHQB5BCnVR8UEc-jL5AyRRnyHxQRJGy3NvmXYVPlDqrz-EssCaEr6W_MErKWNrmaSu_3r2DCiUbCG-SPegcdeK2P87gg2WDEzPUJyisnIrbekP736wzKLw0d_IJZ9UJGLwBHZX8SQQIDeaW_VXH-qnZgfkibaDK8G7DkFHpYMxMhStb3G_SPUyL_QD0Cx-sQRFBwfVebQCb2JQ9Ef37t3U8flID1_oJMVRReHAcn9FI5UJ7JNvJer8wtuqvsIuxtHOYRrqSIbRPkC2A-GTogz7ufjYOyQZl8J0i1R_Cm5-02rUUHvafQu8iwNF2ZXwrfqq4OWgm56zIfMe-eU_WIe42Mhzsg48vYAMIn40u1FbGRZBc-UsrMe2xb617gyn-vQCV355nqFK-THo4arq4CpeuXbQhVDg3H7heo8zc69bqaYYG9typVaDRlpevgzR4jSNiSdoiVTPm509m_mChLKlQM0fZVyRUnZuO9lTyrjAt29GrHuBAmmUCKwNiCNWIVP-pAf_BlIueNy6rgUg-i5HFlRkZ/f4qaHaoPgxnrjUUQKinUMxJV9OvUJiKX/20)
Our fast-approaching major deadline is when we have to make important financial decisions for the entire year. If we come up short of any of our goals, we'll be forced to pull back our ad plans and slash our voter contact budgets.
Nothing would be worse for our race.
The only way we can shock the world and flip this race is by collecting the resources we need to max out our budgets.
We crunched the numbers, and we'll need to raise another $100,000 by the end of the month. That's the bare minimum needed to fully fund all our campaign operations.
I'm hoping everyone reading this can pitch in at least $15 toward that goal. If you can spare it, I respectfully ask for your support before our all-important deadline. Think you can help us out?

clean_body: This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there’s no incumbency advantage. | Hi Peter - this is Michele Tafoya. I had a great life reporting from the sidelines of some of the most memorable football games in sports history. I don't come from the world of politics. Some folks on the far-Left say that makes me unqualified to run for politics. I say being an outsider is an asset. Why? Because the career politicians are the ones running this country into the ground. They oversaw unprecedented fraud, they sold us out to enrich themselves, and they pitted Americans against each other for cheap political gain - the kind of thing that drives normal people like you and me nuts. Unfortunately, the system is fighting back. My opponents are quintessential political elites with a vast network of mega-donors and deep connections with special interests. Like I said, they've been at this for a long time... But I have three (big!) things working in my favor: 1\. This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there's no incumbency advantage. 2\. My opponents are racing each other to the far-Left. One of my opponents stunned voters by saying she regretted voting for the Laken Riley Act. The other is the sitting Lt. Governor, who was in power during the rampant fraud allegations. These extreme records don't appeal to most Minnesotans. 3\. No one in this race will outwork me. I made it to the very top of my industry by being willing to do what it takes to win. We're holding events in every corner of the state, our ads are hard-hitting, and I've got the grit and determination to win. If we can raise the funds, this race is over. That last point is important. Our fast-approaching major deadline is when we have to make important financial decisions for the entire year. If we come up short of any of our goals, we'll be forced to pull back our ad plans and slash our voter contact budgets. Nothing would be worse for our race. The only way we can shock the world and flip this race is by collecting the resources we need to max out our budgets. We crunched the numbers, and we'll need to raise another $100,000 by the end of the month. That's the bare minimum needed to fully fund all our campaign operations. I'm hoping everyone reading this can pitch in at least $15 toward that goal. If you can spare it, I respectfully ask for your support before our all-important deadline. Think you can help us out? | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking the time to read this email! Together, we're going to make history - I can feel it. Be brave. Do good.- Michele Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota Imagine the look on Tim Walz's face when voters reject his handpicked candidate and elect a Republican for the first time in 20 years!That's what I 'm picturing...This is Michele Tafoya - I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before.But I made the decision to run for U.S. Senate because my state has fallen so far in such a short amount of time. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to win, and I've never been one to give up when the going gets tough.I have a hunch you aren't either. | | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

body:

Friend, In three days, Governor Bill Lee and Tennessee Republicans dismantled Tennessee’s only majority-Black congressional district, the result of generations of civil rights work, because Donald Trump told them to. Republicans repealed a law that had protected Tennesseans from exactly this kind of mid-decade power grab. They stripped the requirement that voters be notified when their district changes. Then they passed new maps, signed them, and walked out. **This is not politics as usual. This is a civil rights emergency.** Yesterday, the Tennessee Democratic Party filed a federal lawsuit to challenge this racist and reckless scheme. But a lawsuit is just one part of the fight. Their antics will create chaos for voters, split up communities, and leave thousands of Tennesseans unsure where to vote or who represents them. We need resources _**right now**_ to protect voters, organize in every corner of the state, and fight back in court and on the ground. **That's why I'm asking you personally.** [**Will you stand with us and help fund the legal defense and voter protection effort this state needs?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131101946/619981024/1709264364?refcode=260509-email&Refcode=260509-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDE2Y2RmZC0xMzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZYpb7xF6HcoPkD3OvqeRTFG_yghA88AdAioJrHG8lqg=) | [STAND WITH TNDP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131101947/619981025/-1270985636?refcode=260509-email&Refcode=260509-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDE2Y2RmZC0xMzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZYpb7xF6HcoPkD3OvqeRTFG_yghA88AdAioJrHG8lqg=)

subject: The “water glass trick” used by the US military silences tinnitus in seconds
body:
How do soldiers avoid ear ringing? They do THIS with a glass of water (takes 15 secs) | | | [](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=9b0f960748c5417499321eff921cdf14&_e=orj-X6BBt2bdP9CMwdPZIWPzOo3aM0R2CYX_sAXIgFrdt1GRIwxuZsdnlTpm20ws57GxoOmXjwkW2nO32CQYwT3fp2IVIHS9vnFvEFNq4Su3tsPx1SUPdb1PiZPB1poCnpZOP9r5zKY1xaKQk2twwka3tEOuqfrCAG6mmhpSAl5yxVAX392trmVcfpg8rIJ0fh53V6Mh6nK9NuYsT0Lh6CPYNTw1PpFiLSzngmSyM1bSBqkSlP5ly6qu9QipEHAT1oRqjfQVc2Tomoyd90X_JNCRpmWySvcTR5a9akqGRQ3zmjq-3hoXeZfebQMK6QLMptPTfR6c_NEFfItDABPNKA%3D%3D)
---
| |
# THE “WATER GLASS TRICK” USED BY THE US MILITARY SILENCES TINNITUS IN SECONDS

---
| | | | |
---
Soldiers have to listen to gunfire, explosions, and heavy machinery every day.

As a result, many develop an unbearable ringing in their ears that makes it impossible to concentrate and do their job effectively.

This is why the US military secretly developed [a little-known trick using a glass of water](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=9b0f960748c5417499321eff921cdf14&_e=orj-X6BBt2bdP9CMwdPZIVs5ulD0XY6XxhXD-PSR6dh2uAQHwb0_tqdkq3RJeccJ14NecB9_ECXq_7qGni_-MoHgUq9P0urD0ps6Ihv4mwX2Kt8JT6tXeXfwEy1hTZHhp2oShij5yRO4wzuMWO2OOqd8RdgVIFuQDrIs7rBRzgOi4r9nAVl7DRrgEphgxqKflmmBsCZe2Kb81mvoIyeQSjb_sbsBSp5tH54jbwDP8jaXBjNFiQRgOOuEK2DSdyCxLSow_JK-naASm0ZBXfpHW1x30WJOaLI1cpKBj7eLQWtKr19TlrXJu9lC7tO-WGmKIMkJf9Ae5_1_456IWGW-40YNydOE5z1twJPRHiOhqm-eM8etEKJ-Ej9ldDlm1mU_hdJ8cfZDa2QX9FitMGQN1ZZZXF1WlikCduY0ElhcSIc6GmoolcImY_mO80yOJ7kbyw78MZwfjkhnBjoHGg1dCEUYxVKzqGwfR1_Pbbyju7eos4LB6KpaqndTc7zz9oAipheBTwgJYFIZ-TmlDotFV6m2BIOusCts1N8ElnXfatZl45PKqctBZwcYmzG3QzjMYZo3vzYI5u-i5T7rxGQ-nA%3D%3D) that silences the sounds for good - no matter what was causing them in the first place.

Here’s how to do it:

**1\. Grab a 12-oz glass of COLD water (must be cold)**
**2\. **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
May 8, 2026
**RAFFENSPERGER RELEASES NEW STATEWIDE TV AD: “MUD”**
_Ad contrasts Brad Raffensperger’s focus on Georgia families with opponents’ mudslinging_
ATLANTA — Today, the Brad Raffensperger for Governor campaign released a new statewide television ad titled “Mud,” highlighting the growing contrast in the Republican primary between Brad Raffensperger’s Georgia-focused campaign and opponents spending millions attacking each other.
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/1G7SwliQGmC?e=6036811227&c2id=73967910c0edbe1e25be629224bd5a72)
| |
“Hardworking Georgians are struggling to make ends meet and they’re looking for a proven leader who can deliver real results,” said Brad Raffensperger. “Sadly, when they turn on the TV, open their mailbox, or pick up their phone, all they see are a couple of spoiled rich guys throwing mud at each other. Georgians deserve better. As Governor, I’ll focus on what actually matters: making Georgia more affordable, keeping our communities safe, and fighting for the hardworking families who make this state great.”
The ad reinforces Raffensperger’s record as a Christian conservative businessman and proven public servant who has consistently stood on principle and delivered results for Georgia.
“Mud” is part of a broader statewide television and digital advertising effort as voters continue casting ballots during Early Voting ahead of the May 19 Republican Primary Election.
**Transcript:**
_Creepy Rick Jackson and Big Baby Burt Jones are too busy slinging mud at each other to care about you.__Georgia deserves better.__Brad Raffensperger is a Christian, conservative, businessman.__He created hundreds of great jobs.__And stopped Biden and Abrams from rigging Georgia’s elections.__As Governor, Brad will cap your property taxes.__And champion school choice for our families.__Conservative Brad Raffensperger. For Governor._

[ Ryan@BradForGeorgia.com]()
985.956.2016

body:
A "super El Niño" climate pattern [could develop during the middle of the year](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAUhZ8Gd4wuP7ahoEgiTbdpU1oXuIyJGLAws6t5-8h5hS2PjnR0vu_Px_aBueT6-I1PciO1rdLXWWgM6tv5OqhTqZn9UuynaB5P8lhKoQfVuEmQC4eZC9gi5vLe9BRdIpKkJnJiXY2GdQE57c5qZRaDswqz0ZYEglUASqYUvNAzTtldazALEACLljdrY0wxGhPRggHLNFDMo_Xb35br2CmVd_ukfgvtORW3j3GcTP1g8s7kHY-L4qqu0EcOhZi8U-E118ZDyU8cxPdX7zlgJb4TDh57ez32wTvmyqP1KpLBEIy2wprkvQC7Ju-BvE7L1F08vnIp-VxWpuHxxFz-nxnf1_jp5L8AAAD__2uGhkI), impacting global temperatures and rainfall patterns, according to the World Meteorological Organization.

| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGO4yAQRU-Dd7GKgmCzYDEzkXeZ7SwRNkXCNIEIk7hz-1a6I_UBelnvSfW__r-jPbqYYj79dRcyLRSbaVsTtUbVrrcrVUo5sj-C_eZldivNLqVEJ8reIqDawX7HwXoX08PKzptAhCQ6MnwYRgmDAuzOhsPgQWikWYd5UIiLkItCvyx85hpdF83zG-w5cAAlsdfa--D9OHqnYQTNJJCPrdT-f4m5nSmkR7lT7Zdy6ZI5t3ZdmfjFcGI4bdvWP-p7q29PzXByIdiFiamEQNVGz8QBpRIDQ_VUXwA4vu71NgsmDq-Ib4hMHLJrsWSXdrKXXTX-usWU4qoGJuF0cTF9Nmo_3_Ju8CMAAP__DH-F_Q) | |
# Sunday, May 10, 2026
---|---
**Happy Mother's Day!** On this day in 1908, Anna Jarvis held [the first official Mother's Day service](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ_GdEZr4-OncJFEoru0KZHJLrCRsU-2c4i3j0iXOu3MaDTzfdynu2PPYX13O9myxCnQkT2VQmnK3w9K5AOLt0a8qji7TLPz3tNKAScNupVwkwomdOzPyVRoFyJNTUVWdV1voGtBV5tdOmPoNmOjutkNCMbMRqm2MQ5hQaUrtlcb3BQogNboehgQF8S-RzdAD4MwQMglpvorcigbLf6MT0r1Z9wrb7dSHlk0L0KPQo_HcdTHHM_LFHq8Ll0q5SKfnFYO7IQe91g2SlmiO-VMqwuSg_wTkhslyrJsJHOJ6RR6rJLFx8Hec247YWDdHfvfEeX_-J5W_wQAAP__nsCF3g) at Andrews Methodist Episcopal Church in Grafton, West Virginia, to honor her mother. She sent [500 white carnations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGOpCAUANDT4E7z-SLqgsXMJO5qtr00WHyVyhcM0Jq6faf7Cn2Bt3gfj_lhPfuw_bcHmbLGOdCdmUqhNOfPkxJx8OJfK_7KuNhMi2Vm2ii4GQF1DV0tYXbW83tWlTMrEVJbkZF9PyjoNWC1GwWI3SDVMmolSUI7Di1qPSz62elWq8qbbw06CRJAK2zG0bnVuWFwdoQBRqGAnC8xNa_oQ9lp5Xe8KDXPeFRs9lLOLNo_AieB033fTThzs8VL4HRSPJkETjYEWx82eVu_bLp8bvZyVMm48_bMPuteKNgO6_lHLb__uAx-BQAA___jKnMu) to the church for the service and later campaigned for Mother's Day to become a national holiday. In the early 20th century, Americans rallied around the stories of hope and redemption built by Father Edward Flanagan and Boys Town. But over time, skepticism over broad moral ideals eroded support for the community of homeless and delinquent boys, as noted in ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVvQ4dgx9uAh90YZKqVb1W7I4OPg6oAjcILy9hV9ha7fJ_2G_-e1u_rEab69-4lcibmbaVuZSqGlWx93WojnJP5L8a_JvV-p98xMN5pDh4D6AMdDA13wiV-dqoKLREiyIte0rVHQasBqdAhWDpZia1XbWxgIpTcalIk9aKOxSm7X4NhAA6AV1taGEEMwJngLBqxQQCGVvNTfOc1lpMiv_KSlHvJUsRtLua9CngReBF62batf-VEePe3_vvgyjEJenkKem9OEX2-H80dR1eLCfUvMadWtUHCbfOJfsvw9xtPhTwAAAP__26Vxlg) In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown shared new concerns about what heavy AI use may be doing to our brains. Researchers are warning about a trend they call "cognitive surrender," but is AI really making us worse thinkers? More importantly, how can we avoid falling into the trap ourselves? [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFOwzAQANCvcbZG57ObOIMHKIrEUITEwBg53CU1utpV4rTK3yP4BX7gDe_zPJxDlJjmt3BlX6Y8JH6swqXwMqzbjReWFNXJqGedx7DyGESEZ040IGBzgONBw0Ahyj7YivzEjGwq9rptnYW2AawuHsi0Fq0ZOwdOB9amaWxr3GSPNOoRq-h_NThq0ACNxbrriCYi5yh04KBTFphiyUv9nWMqF55kz3de6q98rcRfSrmtyjwp7BX2e97KVo-ssH9PZnvF9LGdZmX6osyLAawWT7dHFIlr0yoL8zVE-ZPK_w_uHn8CAAD__1rSbZw). Today's sponsor, [FinanceBuzz](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGO4yAQRU-Dd7GKgmCzYDEzkXeZ7SwRNkXCNIEIk7hz-1a6I_UBelnvSfW__r-jPbqYYj79dRcyLRSbaVsTtUbVrrcrVUo5sj-C_eZldivNLqVEJ8reIqDawX7HwXoX08PKzptAhCQ6MnwYRgmDAuzOhsPgQWikWYd5UIiLkItCvyx85hpdF83zG-w5cAAlsdfa--D9OHqnYQTNJJCPrdT-f4m5nSmkR7lT7Zdy6ZI5t3ZdmfjFcGI4bdvWP-p7q29PzXByIdiFiamEQNVGz8QBpRIDQ_VUXwA4vu71NgsmDq-Ib4hMHLJrsWSXdrKXXTX-usWU4qoGJuF0cTF9Nmo_3_Ju8CMAAP__DH-F_Q), is sharing simple, practical tips to help you cut expenses and create extra breathing room--even small changes can make a meaningful difference.
|

## Frontier Jet Hits Pedestrian
A Frontier Airlines plane [hit and killed a pedestrian on the runway](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd0QYg20KiruT0uXaK62FXScbEbAwSZS3P_n_H-EvZ0YazXz_LssFOHG-_oUH-baWJdN7T9Qa1WV_blQpZRZ_BvG7LwF2CpBSoitlXLTSo1RW9mpB4PRZTId-JdI0dOT7aZqNmkalu5sHo9fB2jkQzm4MykFcIQxGk51tRN2xP9qU7VWv1Gj0yTnEFXGeEZyalRNGEXIr9XQvnNuN1vQpL6qnWB5d8rfWtl0Mv4Q-C32G7XhxRIeojWMioc9I-UVVAtet1CbXWnLjbyNxJrlR3UuWnO_PSijrM7_hI2myg7VBB0JHcQhAxsSgRhOdjj1CVz1ub06J93ESRl0fwOlrVvs50JfX_wMAAP__i2WLsw) of Denver International Airport during takeoff on Friday night, causing an engine fire and forcing passengers to evacuate. The unidentified person [jumped the perimeter fence](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2O6yAMhZ-G7Kgch_wtWNx7pex6t7OMSDEtUxcioK3y9iNmHmFkyZJt-dM55-O8no1nH67_zYN0cXEN9M5MpVBa83OnRBy8-NeJv23cTKbNMDNdKdgVAQcJvWxhtcbzsarGakeE1DWk23GcFIwDYHPTm3LYWUBUClU_AbaXrnVbrd5R3zVeVxr0LbQAg8LTPFvrrJ0ma2aYYBYKyPoS0-kz-lBu5PiIL0qnS3w0rG-l7Fl0fwQuApdw7DGXehK4VLDABfraZoHLM8tqUuDiUgzFU5LGJ_aBstzZBJK5JH-nLO-eOcudLNWNCTIGaSm8fj72mIpMz_A2h0xUJ4FLk7Td357Z52EUCq4P4_lbZPl9vC-NXwEAAP__502QLA) and crossed the runway before being hit by the moving plane at close to 11:19 p.m. The person was at least partially sucked into one of the engines, which ignited the brief engine fire. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said in a Saturday morning statement, _"The trespasser on the runway was then struck by Frontier Airlines Flight 4345[during takeoff at high speed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdEbGsPwULpJIdDdtSmTs8eLdWRuNZyG8fbR5hVt_0qdzzp-v5ctGjOn-277AcMhLgrMgMAMt5b0DAaYofrXiZ5NXW2C1iAh3SH7RSvdS3WSjFm8jXktXeRMANLQVmGYYxk4NvdLVZtbRrZ3rJxeaabQ9rFY3aui7ybVhvTmoovm8qVujGqX6TtfT5H3wfhy9ndSoJtEp8JEz1Y8cE28Q8MoHUO3yq0KzMe9FtD-EnoWez_OsQ_77UfnsQs9M9gAUeg6UE0cg-QCWhSk-ochnRCxyByo5SQ_pAJI20p6JJb3TaS_J9gk5BFnAvSnyJVcC67aKjN_PiBhLP4hO3V824n8m_n7Nw-h_AQAA__-Pfo39). The pilot stopped takeoff procedures immediately."_ A dozen people reported minor injuries and [five were transported to local hospitals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwzAQg59G3hScL_6RBw1tAW_p2tGQo3N8rSwZ0jVB3r5w-widCIIACX4fl-niOHC8vbuNrCxpivQogUQoT-V7p0whsno7q9c6za7Q7EIIdKPoJwTsNLS6hsk7Ds-pqbxdiJDOFdm6700DfQdYrbYj09SuHtoruHmecQYaOu_RGGhMR1ixPdqgraEG6Bo8DYP3i_fGeDeAgUE1QJ4l5dNn4igrLeGZ7pRP17RVwa4ie1HnF4WjwlFWWjmEI1M4rmmj45XCsYgT0g8n11Xh2JoeTAt6ySkKU9aOc-BIRXuK9z-_pyx6J09FMruoD_kihWOVrd8fHAKXrlcN3DbHv4uV_J_j3eJPAAAA__8SsYib).
## Super El Niño Possible
A "super El Niño" climate pattern [could develop during the middle of the year](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAUhZ8Gd4wuP7ahoEgiTbdpU1oXuIyJGLAws6t5-8h5hS2PjnR0vu_Px_aBueT6-I1PciO1rdLXWWgM6tv5OqhTqZn9UuynaB5P8lhKoQfVuEmQC4eZC9gi5vLe9BRdIpKkJnJiXY2GdQE57c5qZRaDswqz0ZYEglUASqYUvNAzTtldazALEACLljdrY0wxGhPRggHLNFDMo_Xb35br2CmVd_ukfgvtORW3j3GcTP1g8s7kHY-L4qqu0EcOhZi8U-E118ZDyU8cxPdX7zlgJb4TDh57ez32wTvmyqP1KpLBEIy2wprkvQC7Ju-BvE7L1F08vnIp-VxWpuHxxFz-nxnf1_jp5L8AAAD__2uGhkI), impacting global temperatures and rainfall patterns, according to the World Meteorological Organization. Exceptionally warm waters will boost tropical activity later in October and November raising the [risk of direct impacts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O3SAUBOCnwR1XgH_ABUUSyd2mTWkdw-H6JBgswOvs20c3kfIC244-jUbz4219A4qUnt_hQNtCXhPeNWJrWNZ6nVgwJmLfevZV5g0qbhBjxCcmvyqhJi5GLsXqgeLHOnTeBkSFfYdWam0GoSehut1u46YlaGmClsbPPnix6UFuGrce5Dx2ZF9tYpRCCjEN6jHP3gfvjfEwCyNmNgj01HJ5_MyU2o4hfuR3LA-Xjy7avbWzsv4LUwtTy33fD3DuuhHa_s8wtWBiatmvUshBwlcQeaKUecs8XBj5CY4COf7f8IpQc-KUXEGoyAvVX5WHXLiDSCGXRMB3uIGIH_ibXGZqkcYYoceuWH_eFCPVSbNBPA-g-Hdu-_zR71b9CQAA__9SWJTW) in Hawaii, Southern California, and parts of Mexico. El Niño can also have a stabilizing effect on severe weather. The conditions typically subdue the hurricane season in the Atlantic. The climate pattern is a cyclical and natural warming of patches of the equatorial Pacific Ocean. The [majority of model forecasts suggest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM1uwyAQhJ8G34iWxT_4wKGt5Ft67dHCZomp1hDZNFHevnKqqg_Q6-5oZr75OI9nFzmmy7tbyZaQx0T3nakU2sb960obcYriTYtXlSe30-SYmS6U_IiArYRGKhi9i_wY68rbQISkK7Kq60wNXQtYLbZtVG9qNxlAJK37oEj5CcOsdWOUMlW0hxs0ChRAW-Op770P3hvjXQ8GelED-VjydvrMMZWFAj_yjbbTnNeK7VLKdRf6ReAgcLiTK8vPT-BwEAkcZo6rK_R3-O0PnXySSmKZYsoy5I1mtxe5uschqjbrr_fIHPe2EzVcVhf5GVz-P9nN4ncAAAD__06cfgk) at least a 50-50 chance for a "super El Niño," one in which ocean surface temperatures are at least 2 degrees Celsius warmer than average.
## List: Top Roller Coasters in the US
Phoenix at Knoebels Amusement Park in Elysburg, Pennsylvania was chosen as [the best roller coaster in the United States](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u6zAMxfGnkTcbFCN_DRruLeAtXTsadEglKhgrkJQEefsifYXO5-A3_L-O65Gixv38SVfxNaR1l2dRqVXyWu43yaJ7NB8H89-mjYpspKpylp1XBBxa6FsLK1PU1-oa9kEE5dCIt-M4ORgHwObirbVoR0Y7APW99JubeRpccJuEYG3fRP_WoLdgAQaH3TwzB-ZpYpphgtk4EI415e47xb1eJOgrPSR3p3Rt1F9qvRVz-GdwMbhY2KTU7l6oJqbX-2NwoSdlLgaX99jmpCq5PSUqVbLBpcmeb8-oGsswGgfnK0X95evfwzw8_gQAAP__2Kx3EQ) in a new survey from _USA Today_ 10Best. The classic wooden roller coaster, with panoramic views of the surrounding hills, finished ahead of Phantom's Revenge at Kennywood (West Mifflin, Pennsylvania) and Time Traveler at Silver Dollar City (Branson,__ Missouri). The survey chose Silver Dollar City as America's [best theme park](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMRvouBiMBw9tJbZ07Ygu3BHcGoxsJ1HevkpfofP36Tf8v87TmXzw-_WTNnFlidMujxykFElTvh2SJOxefZzUexsvlOVCIQS5ys4TAvY1dHULE5MPz0lX7BYRlFMlrjVm0GB6wGp1lrU2mgCgN4PtQJOeuwGNIBk7z7by7qVB10IL0GtsrGVemIeBycIAVmkQ9iWm5jv6vayyhGe8S2rmuFXBraUcWZ3eFI4KxxYukktzy1Qi0_P1UTjSgxJnheNrrMsqm9QHpR-FY5UcHw8fgs-9URquG_nwR5f_R7k7_A0AAP__lQR1Bg), embracing the identity of an 1880s mining town. The Hotel Hershey (Hershey, Pennsylvania) topped the list of [best theme-park hotels](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQRk9jOtDYePkpXCSR6DZtSjQww-JkwMj27mpvH5ErpP4-vSe9r-t4RS9-v33ixi4vYdz5mYRz5jim-8GRZffqo1bvOkyYeEIR4RvvNBowTQmXUsNI6OU12oLcwmy4Ltjptu0stA2YYnVL280LIUx6ptlyPVPX27lpe5wICaDw7qTBRYMGaKyp-p5oIeo6wh466JUFJp9DrL6D3_PKi7zCg2M1h60Qt-Z8JFW_KTMoM2iYOOXqnjAHwtf5UWbAJ0ZKygznWOaVNy4PjD_lGjKLMkMRHR1PL-JT0yoLtw29_Any_9M8nPkNAAD__zm6eR8) for its wide range of sports and recreation facilities.

**Whatever happened to Father Flanagan and Boys Town?** Father Edward Flanagan built Boys Town on one of the most radical ideas in early 20th century America: that there was "no such thing as a bad boy." In 1917, the Irish-born Catholic priest opened a small home for homeless and delinquent boys in Omaha, at a time when troubled children were often dumped into prisons or brutal reform schools. What began as a modest shelter soon grew into a self-governing village where boys elected mayors, judges, and commissioners, an experiment in citizenship wrapped in Christian charity. [Here's Father Flanagan talking about its origins](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu7CAQANDT4G6tYWyDKSj-j-Ru06a02GWwiWZhBWQt3z5KrpALvOJ9XNerixzT9u4eZFvIa6KjMrVGZa1fTyrEKYq3QfyX-eYq3Rwz00bJrwioLjBdJKzeRT7XsfM2ECENHVmp9TyCVoDdbqW5G6lQBUQ1yQG1HnUwbho9SdCAXbQ_GkwSJIAasTfG--D9PHtnYAYjRiAfWy79Z46p7RT4zC8q_T0_OrZ7a88qhn8CF4HLcRz9LZ-15SP1uWwClz3WlsspcAmu7VQugV1ym0tdsf55ROZYlRYjbA8X-Vdtf_94WfwOAAD__4cIdCE). The timing was perfect. During the Depression, Americans were desperate for stories of redemption and hope. Boys Town offered both. Then Hollywood arrived. The 1938 film _Boys Town_ , starring Spencer Tracy as Flanagan and Mickey Rooney as a hardened juvenile delinquent, turned the priest into a national folk hero. [You can watch the trailer here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVvQ4dgx9uAh90YZKqVb1W7I4OPg6oAjcILy9hV9ha7fJ_2G_-e1u_rEab69-4lcibmbaVuZSqGlWx93WojnJP5L8a_JvV-p98xMN5pDh4D6AMdDA13wiV-dqoKLREiyIte0rVHQasBqdAhWDpZia1XbWxgIpTcalIk9aKOxSm7X4NhAA6AV1taGEEMwJngLBqxQQCGVvNTfOc1lpMiv_KSlHvJUsRtLua9CngReBF62batf-VEePe3_vvgyjEJenkKem9OEX2-H80dR1eLCfUvMadWtUHCbfOJfsvw9xtPhTwAAAP__26Vxlg). Tracy won an Oscar, donations poured in, and Boys Town became one of the most admired charities in the country. For mid-century America, it symbolized the belief that compassion, discipline, and community could rescue almost any child. But Boys Town also belonged to a particular vision of America. It belonged to an America that believed moral authority could reform society, institutions could shape character, priests and civic leaders deserved trust, and national culture could unite around common myths. That America began to vanish after the 1960s. The country grew more skeptical of churches, paternalism, and grand moral crusades. Experts shifted toward foster care and smaller community programs instead of giant residential campuses. Fundraising controversies in the 1970s further tarnished Boys Town's saintly image. The organization survived by reinventing itself as a broad nonprofit network focused on behavioral health, counseling, and family services. [Boys Town still exists today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUgOHT4C3WMwYDA0NbKVu6dkS4PByqF4iABuX2VXuFHuD_pe_j4i4-UcrHu7-h7bG4jKMR9o7Vte87VqSc2NvKXpey-4a7JyI8MAfHgW8nkKcFXPCJnk5MwUZEjuuEdlFKC1Ab8OlqAaXQUq8GDSowal9WDWAiRi6FlOuU7O8N5AILwCb4bEwIMQStgzegwTABGFIvdf4qKfcrRnqWB9b5s9wmstfe742tL4yfGT-PMea9PFsvI8-lHoyfp2rDfSSi1DbFBBw3n-gv7v9nPyz_CQAA__-GQWrX). What disappeared was the myth. _Did you know the story of Boys Town or see the classic Spencer Tracy movie? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

Exceptionally warm waters will boost tropical activity later in October and November raising the in Hawaii, Southern California, and parts of Mexico. El Niño can also have a stabilizing effect on severe weather. The conditions typically subdue the hurricane season in the Atlantic. The climate pattern is a cyclical and natural warming of patches of the equatorial Pacific Ocean. () | Whatever happened to Father Flanagan and Boys Town? Father Edward Flanagan built Boys Town on one of the most radical ideas in early 20th century America: that there was "no such thing as a bad boy." In 1917, the Irish-born Catholic priest opened a small home for homeless and delinquent boys in Omaha, at a time when troubled children were often dumped into prisons or brutal reform schools. What began as a modest shelter soon grew into a self-governing village where boys elected mayors, judges, and commissioners, an experiment in citizenship wrapped in Christian charity. . The timing was perfect. During the Depression, Americans were desperate for stories of redemption and hope. Boys Town offered both. Then Hollywood arrived. The 1938 film Boys Town , starring Spencer Tracy as Flanagan and Mickey Rooney as a hardened juvenile delinquent, turned the priest into a national folk hero. . Tracy won an Oscar, donations poured in, and Boys Town became one of the most admired charities in the country. For mid-century America, it symbolized the belief that compassion, discipline, and community could rescue almost any child. But Boys Town also belonged to a particular vision of America. It belonged to an America that believed moral authority could reform society, institutions could shape character, priests and civic leaders deserved trust, and national culture could unite around common myths. That America began to vanish after the 1960s. The country grew more skeptical of churches, paternalism, and grand moral crusades. Experts shifted toward foster care and smaller community programs instead of giant residential campuses. Fundraising controversies in the 1970s further tarnished Boys Town's saintly image. The organization survived by reinventing itself as a broad nonprofit network focused on behavioral health, counseling, and family services. . What disappeared was the myth. Did you know the story of Boys Town or see the classic Spencer Tracy movie?
